name: reticle
description: Runtime UI evidence + action harness for Android apps: capture the live view / accessibility / Compose-semantics / WebView DOM tree, resolve precise selectors (including CSS and multi-region controls), inspect DOM style/image metadata, drive real input via adb, patch UI properties without rebuilding, and inject the runtime into a debuggable app over JDWP (no AAR, no repackage, no root).
